name: External Influence of Sphere Definition
description: The product does not prevent the definition of control spheres from external actors. External parties can modify how the product's security boundaries are defined, typically leading to untrusted search paths or environment manipulation.
detection_pattern: EXTERNAL or INGRESS node can modify STRUCTURAL[sphere_definition] or META[boundary_config] nodes that define trust boundaries, without CONTROL[validate] or AUTH[admin_only] restricting who can alter sphere definitions
